payload.answer: The system cannot commit this memory due to low confidence and ambiguity in the 'Sam note'. User intervention is required to resolve.

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguity in 'Sam note' requires user clarification to avoid misinterpretation or false memory commitment.

memory_cards.statement: Cloud escalation disabled and model confidence low for ambiguous Sam note

details: Memory not committed due to low confidence and ambiguity.
Escalation to user for resolution initiated.
